desc: Opens the Filter and Template Manager window — a WebView2 + AI Chat split-panel for creating/editing view filters (15 types including cross-system Error Manager and Clash Detection integration), managing view templates with full 22-property graphic overrides (projection/cut lines, surface/cut fills, halftone, transparency, detail level), and importing/exporting filter+template preset bundles.
summary: Opens the Filter and Template Manager window — a WebView2 + AI Chat split-panel for creating/editing view filters (15 types including cross-system Error Manager and Clash Detection integration), managing view templates with full 22-property graphic overrides (projection/cut lines, surface/cut fills, halftone, transparency, detail level), and importing/exporting filter+template preset bundles.
usecase: User wants to create, edit, or review view filters and templates.
notfor: Running error checks (use QAManagerCommand). Creating views (use view creation commands).
postcondition: FilterAndTemplateManagerWindow is shown as a modeless singleton.

preprompts: Opening the Filter and Template Manager…
Loading filter and template management window…
thinkingsteps: Loading React app with filter data…
successprompts: Filter and Template Manager is now open.
Filter manager ready — {filterCount} filters and {templateCount} templates loaded.
failureprompts: Failed to open Filter and Template Manager: {error}
